texts.desc:
You can only activate 1 card with this card's name per turn. You can activate this card the turn it was Set by revealing 1 Normal Monster in your hand.
①：Special Summon up to 5 Normal Monsters from your hand and/or GY in Attack Position. You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn after this card resolves.
texts.name: Stage of Destiny
texts.str2: Activate by applying the effect of {CARD}.
